issues.text: UNTITLED.SCRIPT Every video starts as a blank page. Every video starts as a blank page.
issues.message: Text content is clipped by its own box.
issues.fixHint: Text is 1920px x 1080px inside 1920px x 1080px and overflows by up to 93px; resize the text box to at least ~2013px x 1132px, or allow wrapping with max-width/fitTextFontSize.

issues.text: UNTITLED.SCRIPT Every video starts as a blank page. Every video starts as a blank page.
issues.message: Text extends outside its nearest visual/container box.
issues.fixHint: Text is 2105px x 1184px inside 1920px x 1080px and overflows by up to 93px; resize the container to at least ~2105px x 1184px or shrink font-size from 16px to ~15px, or allow wrapping with max-width/fitTextFontSize.

issues.message: Text extends outside its nearest visual/container box.
issues.fixHint: Text is 499px x 214px inside 748px x 211px and overflows by up to 226px; increase the container height to at least ~437px or shrink font-size from 96px to ~95px, or allow wrapping with max-width/fitTextFontSize.

issues.message: Text extends outside its nearest visual/container box.
issues.fixHint: Text is 413px x 214px inside 845px x 211px and overflows by up to 2px; increase the container height to at least ~213px or shrink font-size from 96px to ~95px, or allow wrapping with max-width/fitTextFontSize.

issues.message: Text is hidden beneath an opaque element.
issues.fixHint: Give the text its own zone, raise its stacking order above the covering element, or mark intentional layering with data-layout-allow-occlusion.
